economic_notes: Nation operates N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., and N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation as consolidated subsidiaries. St'at'imc (PC) 2011 Trust established from BC Hydro settlement for hydro development impacts on St'at'imc territory.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) tangible capital assets listing is incomplete and may contain assets no longer in use or impaired, making amortization and net book value uncertain; (2) accounts receivable of $453,642 due from band members with $424,336 significantly overdue — allowance for bad debts of $76,785 may be insufficient per PSAS. Nation did not adopt a formal budget for FY2022 so no budget comparatives are presented. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,401,038) + FNHA ($191,583) + Government of Canada ($125,699) + Province of BC ($2,930,684) + CMHC ($69,644) + FNESC ($12,651) + New Relationship Trust ($1,600) + BC Hydro ($104,393) = $6,837,292 (slight rounding variance); OSR includes St'at'imc Trust, Rental Income, Interest Income, Other Revenue, NEEDCO Sales, and Tribal Councils. Social Housing expenses included under separate line ($201,406) mapped to expenses_housing. Natural Resource Management ($109,970) not mapped to a standard category.
